function.message: Completed the next inbox task by running the six requested finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added YAML frontmatter to all six records using the finance schema, preserved each original body verbatim below frontmatter, and deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS files for 99_system, inbox, and finance lanes, used OCR+migration workflow docs and finance schema, preserved note bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to OCR six listed finance files. Each target file contained all required visible fields and line-item data specified by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, enabling complete schema-compliant frontmatter insertion without guessing. All six files were updated, then the processed inbox item was removed per inbox workflow rules.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to 6 target finance files
